prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第23名，近年稳定在21–25名区间，属全国顶尖工科院校 ，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被地方黑恶势力殴打、校方被指偏袒不作为），可能轻微影响 部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度一般（总排名第74），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显热度助推信号；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与 工程A+、机械工程A等7个A-及以上学科，在国防军工、信息技术领域具有突出优势，相关专业报考热度高，持续吸引高分考生。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 航空航天类、电子信息/ 通信、计算机类等核心专业社会热度高热推荐，报考竞争激烈；本省2026年物理类考生约30700人，较2025年30457人小幅增加约0.8%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生规模小幅增加、优势学科专业热度高企等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准280 名基础上继续小幅前移；预测最低位次约265名，区间233–297名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 685 → 561 → 465 → 328 → 280 (2025 is an estimated value), showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 405 positions over the past 4 years, an average annual forward shift of about 100 positions, and intensifying competition year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 280; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 9 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 7 in 2024, and maintained at 7 in 2025 (estimated); the 2026 plan remains at 7 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 23rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 21–25 range in recent years, belonging to the top engineering institutions nationwide, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students beaten by local criminal forces, the university accused of bias and inaction), which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 74th), with moderate short video exposure, no obvious popularity boost signal; aerospace science and technology A+, computer science and technology A+, materials science and engineering A+, mechanical engineering A, and 7 other A- and above disciplines, with outstanding advantages in national defense, military industry, and information technology fields, related majors have high application popularity, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as aerospace, electronic information/communication, and computer science are highly recommended with high social popularity, leading to intense competition for applications; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 30,700, a slight increase of about 0.8% from 30,457 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the number of provincial candidates, and high popularity of advantageous disciplines and majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will continue to move forward slightly from the 2025 baseline of 280; the predicted minimum ranking is about 265, with a range of 233–297.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 233–297, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Software Engineering as the main choice, with Tier 1 Aerospace/Electronic Information as a reach, and Tier 3 Chemistry as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<233), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>297), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University has only one admission record in Qinghai Province for liberal arts/history category in 2024, with a minimum ranking of approximately 532. The data is limited to a single year, making it impossible to determine long-term trends. The baseline ranking for 2025 is estimated to be around 530, assuming no change. The provincial liberal arts plan for 2024 had only 2 students (1 major in Economics and Trade). In 2026, the history category plan significantly expands to 10 students (4 in Economics and Trade, 4 in Foreign Languages and Literature, 2 in Marxist Theory), an expansion rate of 400%, significantly increasing admission opportunities, and the ranking is expected to drop substantially.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks among the top 25 nationally in the Soft Science ranking, making it a top-tier university. However, as a science and engineering institution, its liberal arts programs have relatively low social recognition. In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), and its popularity on Douyin is average, having limited impact on liberal arts candidates' willingness to apply. NPU's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (aerospace, computer science, materials, etc.), while its liberal arts programs (Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature, Marxist Theory) have no A- or above discipline evaluation records, making their academic appeal average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economics and Trade is divided and cautious, while Foreign Languages and Literature is generally cautious. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in the province is approximately 17,300, basically unchanged from 17,212 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the history category enrollment plan in 2026 by 400%, the average appeal of liberal arts programs, and the basically stable number of candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will drop substantially from the 2025 baseline of 530. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1,752, with a range of 1,542 to 1,962.

It is recommended to prioritize Tier 1 Economics and Trade as the main choice, use Tier 2 Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option, and Tier 3 Marxist Theory as a secure fallback. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<1,542), you can aim for Tier 1.
